# certcentral_certificate (Resource)

Manages a certificate configuration in cert-central.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "certcentral_certificate" "example" {
  primary = "example.com"
  sans    = [
    "*.example.com",
    "www.example.com"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `primary` (String) The primary domain name (e.g. example.com).

### Optional

- `sans` (List of String) Subject Alternative Names (SANs) for the certificate.
